mapper.select: select distinct d.delivery_id as deliveryId, d.delivery_no as deliveryNo, d.zs_order_id as zsOrderId, d.order_no as orderNo, d.delivery_amount as deliveryAmount, d.delivery_status as deliveryStatus, d.audit_status as auditStatus, d.create_time as createTime, h.hospital_name as hospitalName, s.company_name as supplierName from scm_delivery d left join scm_hospital h on d.hospital_id = h.hospital_id left join scm_supplier s on d.supplier_id = s.supplier_id left join scm_delivery_detail dd on dd.delivery_id = d.delivery_id left join zs_tp_order_detail zod on zod.id = dd.zs_order_detail_id and zod.del_flag = '0' where (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') and ( d.delivery_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(zod.dsb as char) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by d.create_time desc limit 500

select d.delivery_id as deliveryId, d.delivery_no as deliveryNo, d.zs_order_id as zsOrderId, d.zs_customer_id as zsCustomerId, d.invoice_no as invoiceNo, d.src_order_warehouse_name as srcOrderWarehouseName, d.warehouse_name as warehouse, d.invoice_date as invoiceDate, d.invoice_amount as invoiceAmount, d.zs_jsfs as zsJsfs, d.audit_time as auditTime from scm_delivery d where d.delivery_no = #{deliveryNo} and (d.del_flag is null or d.del_flag = '0') limit 1

select d.detail_id as detailId, d.zs_order_detail_id as zsOrderDetailId, d.material_code as materialCode, d.delivery_quantity as deliveryQuantity, d.batch_no as batchNo, d.aux_barcode as auxBarcode, d.expire_date as expireDate, d.production_date as productionDate, d.main_barcode as mainBarcode, d.material_name as materialName, d.price as price, d.register_no as registerNo, d.unit as unit from scm_delivery_detail d where d.delivery_id = #{deliveryId} order by d.detail_id
select delivery_detail_id as deliveryDetailId, seed_num as seedNum, barcode_no as barcodeNo from scm_delivery_detail_barcode where delivery_id = #{deliveryId} order by delivery_detail_id, seed_num
select id, dh, supno, ck, ckno, ksbh, jsfs, zjly from zs_tp_order where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
select id, dsb from zs_tp_order_detail where order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = '0'
